$BNKR Market Update (Base)

Price: $0.000357
24h Change: +0.1%
Volume: Moderate

Technical Analysis
BNKR is consolidating after a bounce from the $0.000317 bottom. The formation of higher lows suggests a healthy accumulation phase as buyers defend the $0.000346 level.

Key Levels
• Resistance: $0.000365 / $0.000380
• Support: $0.000346 / $0.000317

Outlook
Neutral-bullish. Macro tailwinds are strong with Japan's crypto tax reclassification and today's U.S. Senate vote on the CLARITY Act. A clean break above $0.000365 confirms the next leg toward $0.000380.
